decks.notes: This deck utilizes a variety of creatures to generate a powerful synergy and combo potential. By searching for specific creatures with tools like Green Sun's Zenith and Chord of Calling, the player can assemble a toolbox of creatures to disrupt the opponent's strategy and win the game. Cards like Yawgmoth, Thran Physician and Grist, the Hunger Tide provide additional value and removal options, while combo pieces like Malevolent Rumble and Agatha's Soul Cauldron offer a win condition. With careful planning and sequencing, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a versatile and powerful creature-based strategy.

This deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly to bring out powerful land creatures like Primeval Titan and Cultivator Colossus. The key strategy is to use cards like Amulet of Vigor and Simic Growth Chamber to repeatedly play and trigger land abilities, allowing for explosive plays that can quickly overwhelm the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Scapeshift and Green Sun's Zenith to search for specific lands or creatures needed to execute the combo efficiently. The goal is to generate a massive board presence and overwhelming the opponent with powerful land and creature synergies.

The main idea of this deck is to use the Allosaurus Rider, Eldritch Evolution, and Neoform to quickly bring out powerful creature combos like Griselbrand and Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant. The deck includes a variety of ways to search for and protect these combo pieces, such as Summoner's Pact and Pact of Negation. Additionally, cards like Disciple of Freyalise and Planar Genesis provide mana ramp and board control to help set up the combo for a game-winning finish.

This deck focuses on utilizing non-land cards to quickly assemble a powerful combo involving Hydroelectric Specimen and Goblin Charbelcher. By controlling the opponent's spells with cards like Jwari Disruption and Disrupting Shoal, and drawing cards with Sea Gate Restoration and Waterlogged Teachings, the deck aims to disrupt and delay the opponent while setting up the win condition. The key strategy is to deploy the combo pieces quickly and efficiently, using cards like Lotus Bloom and Whir of Invention to search for the necessary components.

The main concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy using efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Arena of Glory and Goblin Bombardment to control the board and maintain pressure. With a mix of burn spells and powerful threats like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, the deck aims to quickly close out the game before the opponent can respond effectively. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the aggressive game plan and maximize consistency.

The main concept of this deck is to ramp up mana quickly using Eldrazi Temple and Green Sun's Zenith in order to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and Kozilek's Command. The deck also utilizes control elements such as Malevolent Rumble and Fight Rigging to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Slumbering Trudge and Devourer of Destiny provide additional threats on the board, while cards like Turntimber Symbiosis and Sowing Mycospawn help to search for key cards. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast mana acceleration and powerful Eldrazi creatures.

This deck focuses on controlling the opponent's resources and board state by utilizing a combination of removal spells, hand disruption, and powerful planeswalkers. It also aims to abuse graveyard synergies with cards like Necrodominance and Graveyard Trespasser. The strategy is to outvalue the opponent through card advantage and efficient removal, while also setting up powerful combos with cards like Gonti's Machinations and Soul Spike. Overall, the deck aims to grind out games and outlast the opponent through attrition and resource management.

This combo deck aims to generate large amount of mana quickly using rituals and Ruby Medallion, while using card draw and Ral, Monsoon Mage to find combo pieces. The deck then uses Past in Flames to recast spells from the graveyard and finish the game with Grapeshot. The deck also includes Wish as a toolbox card to find specific answers when needed. The land base includes fetch lands to thin the deck and trigger landfall abilities, as well as Sunbaked Canyon for card draw. The deck is designed to win in a explosive and efficient manner.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on quick and aggressive creature plays, utilizing cards like Detective's Phoenix, Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to apply early pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes powerful removal spells like Fatal Push and Solitude to deal with threats from the opponent. With a mix of creatures, removal, and disruption, the deck aims to win the game quickly by overwhelming the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize.

The deck focuses on cycling through your deck aggressively to get your combo pieces into your graveyard, specifically your "Living End" spell. By utilizing cards like Street Wraith and Curator of Mysteries to cycle quickly, you set up for a huge board wipe and graveyard recursion with Living End. With the help of Endurance and Force of Negation to protect your combo, you aim to overwhelm your opponent with powerful creatures that you bring back from the graveyard. The key is to control the game until you can execute your combo successfully.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures and burning spells to deal damage to the opponent before they can establish a strong defense. The key strategy is to swarm the board with efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer, while using burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to clear the way and finish off the opponent. The deck also includes disruption like The Legend of Roku and Dalkovan Encampment to control the opponent's board and secure victory.

The main concept of this UR Storm deck is to quickly generate mana with rituals, draw cards with cantrips and combo pieces, and eventually cast a massive amount of spells in one turn to win with a Grapeshot or Ral, Monsoon Mage's ultimate ability. Desperate Ritual, Pyretic Ritual, and Ral, Monsoon Mage's ability all contribute to generating mana, while Preordain, Stock Up, and Manamorphose help dig for combo pieces. The deck aims to assemble the right pieces at the right time to achieve a powerful storm count and overwhelm the opponent in one explosive turn.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by assembling the UrzaTron lands (Urza's Mine, Tower, and Power Plant) to generate massive amounts of mana, allowing for the casting of powerful Eldrazi creatures and spells to dominate the battlefield. Utilizing cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, Eye of the Storms, along with disruption spells like Thought-Knot Seer and Kozilek's Command, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while building up its own threats to ultimately overwhelm and outvalue the opponent.

This deck focuses on accelerating mana with Eldrazi Ramp cards like Eldrazi Temple and Utopia Sprawl to quickly cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and Sire of Seven Deaths. It also includes control elements such as Malevolent Rumble and Kozilek's Command to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with big threats and control the battlefield to secure victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing Amulet of Vigor to generate extra mana and speed up the combo potential of Primeval Titan, allowing the player to assemble the necessary lands quickly and efficiently. By utilizing cards like Crumbling Vestige and Scapeshift, the deck can quickly ramp up to produce a lethal amount of mana to cast powerful spells like Malevolent Rumble or Cultivator Colossus. With strong land interaction and efficient ramp, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats and combo potential.

Utilizing Eldrazi creatures and ramping up mana quickly to control the battlefield with powerful spells and abilities. Key cards like Karn, the Great Creator allow for artifact synergy, while Emrakul, the Promised End and other Eldrazi creatures pose a serious threat to the opponent. The deck focuses on controlling the game and overwhelming the opponent with big creatures and disruptive spells. Ramp cards like Utopia Sprawl and Eldrazi Temple help accelerate mana production, allowing for early plays of powerful threats. Overall, the deck aims to dominate the game through a combination of control and ramp strategies.
